entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop used in the study for yield improvement

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY STUDIES
entities.description: Studies to evaluate the ability of parents to transmit favorable characters to progeny

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of agricultural production

entities.name: LINE X TESTER DESIGN
entities.description: A mating design used to estimate general and specific combining ability

entities.name: ICGV-86125
entities.description: A specific groundnut line identified as a good general combiner

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The weight of pods produced per plant or area

entities.name: KERNEL YIELD
entities.description: The weight of kernels produced per plant or area

entities.name: UNIT POD WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of a single pod

entities.name: GCA EFFECTS
entities.description: General combining ability effects reflecting the average performance of a parent

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic effects resulting from dominance or epistasis

entities.name: SHELLING OUTTURN
entities.description: The ratio of kernel weight to pod weight

entities.name: ADDITIVE EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic effects resulting from the additive action of alleles

entities.name: POD NUMBER
entities.description: The number of pods per plant

entities.name: PRIMARY BRANCHES
entities.description: The number of primary branches on the plant

entities.name: GENE ACTION
entities.description: The manner in which genes produce a phenotype

entities.name: BREEDING METHOD
entities.description: A systematic approach to improve crop traits by exploiting gene action
